summary: Replaced the generated promoted bookmarks command with a hand-built one that auto-resolves user_id from the account endpoint and degrades gracefully when not signed in.
reason: The bookmarked_stages_from_user endpoint requires the caller's own user_id (an int) plus a logged-in cookie session; the generated promoted command required a UUID-shaped --user-id flag and errored (exit 5) without a session, failing the live dogfood matrix.
validated_outcome: bookmarks now resolves user_id from account; returns a clear hint + [] + exit 0 when anonymous; live dogfood passes.
